units.name: mkube-agent.service
units.contents:
[Unit]
Description=mkube job agent (container)
After=network-online.target
Wants=network-online.target

[Service]
Type=simple
Restart=always
RestartSec=5
ExecStartPre=-/usr/bin/podman rm -f mkube-agent
ExecStart=/usr/bin/podman run --name mkube-agent --rm --network host --privileged -v /var/data:/data -e MKUBE_API=http://192.168.200.2:8082 --pull=always registry.gt.lo:5000/mkube-agent:edge
ExecStop=/usr/bin/podman stop mkube-agent
TimeoutStartSec=600
StandardOutput=journal
StandardError=journal

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
